# Hypura Benchmark Charts

*Auto-generated by `benchmarks/gen_charts.sh`*

## Generation Speed (tok/s)

Higher is better.

### Models that fit in memory

```
  tinyllama-1.1b Q4 (0.6 GB)          ██████████████████████████████ 71.8 tok/s
  qwen2.5-14b Q4 (8.4 GB)             ██████████░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░ 24.0 tok/s
```

### Models that exceed RAM (llama.cpp = OOM)

```
  mixtral-8x7b Q5 (31 GB on 32 GB RAM)               █████████████████████████ 2.2 tok/s
  llama-3.3-70b Q4 (40 GB on 32 GB RAM)              ███░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░ 0.3 tok/s

  llama.cpp: OOM on all models above (cannot run at any n_gpu_layers)
```

How model tensors are distributed across storage tiers.

```
  tinyllama-1.1b Q4                   [▓▓▓▓▓▓▓▓▓▓▓▓▓▓▓▓▓▓▓▓▓▓▓▓▓▓▓▓▓▓▓▓▓▓▓▓▓▓▓▓] 0.6 GB GPU
  qwen2.5-14b Q4                      [▓▓▓▓▓▓▓▓▓▓▓▓▓▓▓▓▓▓▓▓▓▓▓▓▓▓▓▓▓▓▓▓▓▓▓▓▓▓▓▓] 8.4 GB GPU

  llama-3.3-70b Q4                    [▓▓▓▓▓▓▓░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░░] 7.8 GB GPU | 32 GB NVMe

  ▓ GPU (Metal)  ▒ RAM  ░ NVMe
```
